description.en: Compare 304 vs 316 stainless steel hex bolts for your project. Learn corrosion resistance, strength, pricing, and factory supply options. Expert guide from TradeGo fasteners.
description.zh: 比较304与316不锈钢六角螺栓。了解耐腐蚀性、强度、价格和工厂供应选项。来自TradeGo紧固件的专家指南。
description.es: Compare pernos hexagonales de acero inoxidable 304 vs 316. Resistencia a la corrosión, resistencia, precio y opciones de suministro de fábrica.

keywords: 304 stainless steel hex bolt, 316 stainless steel hex bolt, marine grade bolt, stainless bolt factory, hex bolt supplier, SS hex bolt wholesale

body.en: Stainless steel hex bolts are essential for applications requiring corrosion resistance. Type 304 contains 18-20% chromium and 8-10.5% nickel, making it ideal for general indoor and outdoor applications. Type 316 adds 2-3% molybdenum, dramatically improving resistance to chlorides and marine environments. For construction fasteners in coastal areas or near saltwater, 316 is the clear choice despite its 20-30% higher cost. Both grades are non-magnetic in annealed condition and meet ASTM F593 (316) and ASTM A193 Grade B8 (304) specifications. When selecting between grades, consider the service environment: inland industrial applications typically suit 304, while harbors, chemical plants, and marine installations require 316.
body.zh: 不锈钢六角螺栓是耐腐蚀应用的关键紧固件。304型含18-20%铬和8-10.5%镍，适合一般室内外应用。316型添加2-3%钼，显著提高氯化物和海洋环境耐受性。沿海地区或盐水附近的项目，尽管316成本高20-30%，却是明确选择。

heading.en: Factory Supply: Full Thread vs Half Thread Hex Bolts

body.en: Factory supply of stainless steel hex bolts includes both full thread and partial thread options. Full thread hex bolts (DIN 933 / ISO 4017) provide maximum clamping force along the entire shank, ideal for applications where the bolt passes completely through the material. Half thread hex bolts (DIN 931 / ISO 4014) offer higher shear strength at the unthreaded shank and are preferred for structural connections where the thread does not extend into the shear plane. Long hex bolts (also called tap bolts) with extended shank lengths are available for specialized applications requiring extra engagement. Our factory stocks M6 to M30 sizes in both 304 and 316 grades, with A2-70 and A4-80 strength classifications available.
body.zh: 不锈钢六角螺栓的工厂供应包括全螺纹和半螺纹选项。全螺纹六角螺栓（DIN 933 / ISO 4017）沿整个螺杆提供最大夹紧力，适合螺栓完全穿过材料的场合。半螺纹六角螺栓（DIN 931 / ISO 4014）在未螺纹段提供更高剪切强度，是需要抗剪平面优势的结构连接首选。

heading.en: Marine Grade 316 Hex Bolts for Ship Building

body.en: The marine industry demands fasteners that withstand constant saltwater exposure. Grade 316 stainless steel hex bolts provide superior corrosion resistance in these harsh conditions. Ship building applications include deck fittings, hull connections, railing systems, and engine mounting where both strength and corrosion resistance are critical. Our marine grade bolts meet ASTM A193 B8M requirements and are tested for resistance to pitting and crevice corrosion in simulated seawater environments. The molybdenum content in 316 specifically protects against chloride ion attack, which is why classification societies require 316 or higher for above-water hardware on vessels operating in tropical waters.
body.zh: 海洋工业需要能够承受持续盐水接触的紧固件。316不锈钢六角螺栓在这些恶劣条件下提供卓越的耐腐蚀性。船用应用包括甲板配件、船体连接、栏杆系统和发动机安装等。

heading.en: 304 vs 316 Stainless Steel Hex Bolt Specifications

body.en: Compare mechanical properties and chemical composition of 304 and 316 stainless steel hex bolts for accurate specification selection.

q.en: What is the price difference between 304 and 316 hex bolts?
q.zh: 304和316六角螺栓的价格差异是多少？

a.en: 316 stainless steel hex bolts typically cost 20-30% more than 304 grade. The premium is due to molybdenum content and superior corrosion resistance.
a.zh: 316不锈钢六角螺栓通常比304级贵20-30%。溢价来自钼含量和卓越的耐腐蚀性。

q.en: Can 304 stainless steel bolts be used outdoors?
q.zh: 304不锈钢螺栓可以用在室外吗？

a.en: 304 bolts work outdoors in dry, non-coastal environments. For coastal, marine, or high-chloride environments, always use 316 or higher grade.
a.zh: 304螺栓适用于干燥、非沿海的室外环境。对于沿海、海洋或高氯化物环境，始终使用316或更高级别。

q.en: What does A2-70 and A4-80 mean?

a.en: A2-70 is the designation for 304 stainless steel with minimum tensile strength of 700 MPa. A4-80 is 316 stainless steel with 800 MPa minimum tensile strength.
a.zh: A2-70是304不锈钢的标识，最小抗拉强度为700 MPa。A4-80是316不锈钢，最小抗拉强度为800 MPa。

meta_description: 304 vs 316 stainless steel hex bolts comparison. ISO 9001 manufacturer. Choose the right grade for marine, food & industrial applications in Africa.

q.en: What is the difference between 304 and 316 stainless steel bolts?

a.en: 316 contains 2-3% molybdenum for enhanced corrosion resistance, especially against chlorides. 304 is suitable for general use, 316 for marine and chemical environments.
a.zh: 316含有2-3%的钼，可增强耐腐蚀性，尤其是抗氯化物。304适用于一般用途，316适用于海洋和化学环境。

q.en: When should I use 316 stainless steel bolts instead of 304?
q.zh: 什么时候应该使用316不锈钢螺栓而不是304？

a.en: Use 316 for coastal/marine environments, swimming pools, chemical processing, food-grade applications, and anywhere exposed to salt or chlorides.
a.zh: 在沿海/海洋环境、游泳池、化学加工、食品级应用以及任何暴露于盐或氯化物的地方使用316。

q.en: What are the mechanical properties of stainless hex bolts?
q.zh: 不锈钢六角螺栓的机械性能是什么？

a.en: Stainless hex bolts typically have tensile strength 500-700 MPa, yield strength 200-350 MPa, and are available in grades A2-70, A2-80, A4-70, A4-80.
a.zh: 不锈钢六角螺栓的抗拉强度通常为500-700 MPa，屈服强度为200-350 MPa，有A2-70、A2-80、A4-70、A4-80等级。

q.en: Can stainless steel bolts be used with carbon steel in Africa?
q.zh: 不锈钢螺栓能否与碳钢一起用于非洲？

a.en: Avoid direct contact between dissimilar metals to prevent galvanic corrosion. Use stainless washers or nylon isolators when joining stainless to carbon steel.
a.zh: 避免不同金属直接接触以防止电偶腐蚀。连接不锈钢和碳钢时，使用不锈钢垫圈或尼龙隔离物。

q.en: Do you supply stainless hex bolts to African markets?
q.zh: 您是否向非洲市场供应不锈钢六角螺栓？

a.en: Yes, we supply both 304 and 316 stainless hex bolts to Africa with competitive pricing. Available in sizes M6-M24 and lengths from 20mm to 300mm.
a.zh: 是的，我们以有竞争力的价格向非洲供应304和316不锈钢六角螺栓。尺寸M6-M24，长度从20mm到300mm可选。
